Events & Lectures

Excerpts of public speaking roles, project panels, and live auditory events.

🎤 Speaking Events & Presentations

  • Panel Discussion Title — Creative Technology Summit, City (Year)

Speaker on the panel covering environmental signal transduction and responsive spaces.

  • Artist Presentation & Guest Lecture — Art Academy, City, Country (Year)

Presenter discussing artistic hardware developments and community workshops.

  • Keynote: Demystifying Open Hardware — Media Design Festival, City (Year)

Opening address outlining open-source physical computing tools for studio practices.

🎹 Live Performances

  • Live Coding / Sound Performance — Electronic Music Festival, Venue, City (Year)

Generative modular sound spatialization performance.

  • Acoustic Signal Spatialization Concert — Creative Lab Auditorium, City (Year)

Duo performance mapping real-time seismic fluctuations to audio.
